uiStateHints.label: Theme mode
uiStateHints.reason: Prompt requests the Theme mode UI state with value "light".
notes: Stateful UI bugs should declare and verify the requested UI state before screenshot evidence is trusted.
Prefer reusable state activation contracts over prompt-specific routing or one-off checkpoint logic.
Theme-sensitive UI bugs require paired light-mode and dark-mode screenshot evidence; do not accept a dark-mode-only capture set.
Verify the active theme state before trusting screenshot comparisons.
Prefer the shared dark query parameter during generated verification so screenshots start in the requested theme.
Dark-theme verification should keep a light-mode reference screenshot alongside the dark-mode target evidence.

repoContext: Intent Studio serves as the primary runtime for demo UI and test execution monitoring.
adaptiveBoundaries: Indicator must update in real-time without blocking the main Studio execution loop.
minimumSuccess: Visual indicator displays active test status and state codes during AI-generated test runs.
baseline: Studio execution currently locks until the reviewed draft is sent via /api/drafts/:id/send.
verificationObligations: Verify indicator state updates using Playwright interactions; ensure theme-sensitive UI consistency.

stages.label: Prompt Interpretation

stages.label: TDD Planning
